lines.line: ម្ដងទៀតហើយ ដែលពួកវារករឿង
lines.translation: Again, they find a way.
lines.phonetic: mdongtiet haey  del puokvea rokrueng

lines.line: ពួកយើងឈរបក់ដៃ មកហ្អែងមកឱ្យលឿន
lines.translation: We stand, wave, come quickly
lines.phonetic: puok yeung chhr bkdai  mk haeng mk aoy luen

lines.line: យើងសម្រុកទៅមុខ ព្រោះចិត្តយើងសឿង
lines.translation: We rush forward because our hearts are full
lines.phonetic: yeung samrouk towmoukh  proh chett yeung sueng

lines.line: បើកភ្លើងខៀវ ហៅយើងបិទភ្លើងលឿង
lines.translation: Turn on the blue light, call us off the yellow light
lines.phonetic: baekaphleung khiev  haw yeung betophleung lueng

lines.line: អត់ចង់បន្ថយទេ ចង់តែបន្ថែមល្បឿន
lines.translation: Do not want to decrease, want to increase speed
lines.phonetic: at chng banthoy te  chng te banthemolbuen

lines.line: ដៃក្តាប់ណែន ឱបជាប់តែកាំភ្លើង
lines.translation: Grip hands, holding only guns
lines.phonetic: daiktab nen  aob cheab te kaphleung

lines.line: មានឈាមខ្មែរ នៅក្នុងខ្លួនយើង
lines.translation: There is Khmer blood in us
lines.phonetic: mean chheam khmer  nowknong khluon yeung

lines.line: ពួកណាចង់ប្លន់ដី ប្រយ័ត្នបាត់ដៃជើង
lines.translation: Those who want to rob the land, beware of losing limbs
lines.phonetic: puok na chng blan dei  braytn bat daicheung

lines.line: បើសិនយើងអន់ បើសិនយើងខ្សោយ
lines.translation: If we are bad, if we are weak
lines.phonetic: baesen yeung an  baesen yeung khsaaoy

lines.line: ថ្ងៃមុខ គេមិនអត់ឱនឱ្យ
lines.translation: The next day they will not tolerate
lines.phonetic: thngaimoukh  ke min ataon aoy

lines.line: តែពួកយើងនេះវាខ្លាំង
lines.translation: But for us, it is strong
lines.phonetic: te puok yeung nih vea khlang

lines.line: វាយហ៊ានតតាំង កំដរហ្អែងដល់វគ្គចុងក្រោយ
lines.translation: Dare to fight to the end
lines.phonetic: veay han ttang  kamdr haeng dl vokk chongokraoy

lines.line: ទឹកភ្នែកស្រក់ហូរប្រែក្លាយជាស្ទឹង
lines.translation: Tears turn into rivers
lines.phonetic: tukaphnek srak haur bre klaycha stoeng

lines.line: តែនៅតែខំ រក្សាលំនឹង
lines.translation: But still trying to balance
lines.phonetic: te nowte kham  roksaa lomnung

lines.line: ឃើញបងប្អូនខ្មែរគាត់យំ ខ្ញុំខឹង
lines.translation: Seeing Cambodians crying, I'm angry
lines.phonetic: kheunh bangobaaun khmer keat yom  khnhom khoeng

lines.line: ថ្ងៃនេះខ្ញុំឱ្យអ្នកដឹង
lines.translation: Today I let you know
lines.phonetic: thngainih khnhom aoy anakdoeng

lines.line: ឃើញយើងញញឹមញញែម តែមិនមែន
lines.translation: See us smiling but not
lines.phonetic: kheunh yeung nhnhumonhnhem  te minmen

lines.line: ខ្លបខ្លាច រះបីបង់មួយកំហឹងបិសាច
lines.translation: Fear rises, pays a rage monster
lines.phonetic: khlabakhlach  reah bei bng muoy kamhoeng besach

lines.line: ចេញមកកាច មិនមែនចេញមកខ្លាច
lines.translation: Come out fierce, not come out scared
lines.phonetic: chenh mk kach  minmen chenh mk khlach

lines.line: ខ្ញុំឱ្យអ្នកស្លន់ស្លោ រត់ចែកជើងប្រសាច
lines.translation: I let you panic run wild
lines.phonetic: khnhom aoy anak slanslao  rt chek cheung brasaeach

lines.line: យើងមិននៅស្ងៀម កូនប្រុសម៉ែ
lines.translation: We are not silent, son, mother
lines.phonetic: yeung min now sngiem  kaunobrosa me

lines.line: មិនដែលខ្លាចពួកអាសៀម
lines.translation: Never afraid of Asians
lines.phonetic: min del khlach puok a siem

lines.line: យើងមិនដែលចេះចាញ់ ពាក្យគេគំរាម
lines.translation: We never lose the threat
lines.phonetic: yeung min del cheh chanh  peaky ke koumream

lines.line: យើងសម្លេះចោល ពួកអាណាចង់ឈ្លានពាន
lines.translation: We reject the Ana who want to invade
lines.phonetic: yeung samlih chaol  puok ana chng chhleanpean

words.translation: ស ម្លែ ង

lines.translation: ... Music ...
lines.phonetic: ... phleng...

lines.line: ពួកយើងខំណាស់ ខំយប់ថ្ងៃ
lines.translation: We work hard day and night
lines.phonetic: puok yeung kham nasa  kham yb thngai

lines.line: ពេលខ្លះ ស្ទើរតែដាច់សរសៃ
lines.translation: Sometimes almost paralyzed
lines.phonetic: pelokhleah  staerte dach sarsai

lines.line: តែនៅតែពង្រឹង ស្មារតី
lines.translation: But still strengthen the spirit
lines.phonetic: te nowte pongrung smartei

lines.line: តស៊ូរក្សាទឹកដី
lines.translation: Struggle to preserve territory
lines.phonetic: tsaou roksaa tukdei

lines.line: អ្នកយកចុះ បើអ្នកយកបាន
lines.translation: You take it down if you can take it
lines.phonetic: anak yk choh  bae anak yk ban

lines.line: បើអ្នកគិតថា អ្នកក្លាហាន
lines.translation: If you think you are brave
lines.phonetic: bae anak kitthea anakaklahean

lines.line: បាញ់មួយលេង ទុកការកំសាន្ត
lines.translation: One shot, play, leave entertainment
lines.phonetic: banh muoy leng  touk kar kamsant

words.word: ការកំសាន្ត

lines.line: ចេញប្រមាញ់ ពួកអាតិរច្ឆាន
lines.translation: Out to hunt monsters
lines.phonetic: chenh bramanh  puok a terochchhan

lines.line: Woah We're done enough woah
lines.translation: Woah We're done enough woah
lines.phonetic: woah we're done enough woah

lines.line: We're done enough yeah woah
lines.translation: We're done enough yeah woah
lines.phonetic: we're done enough yeah woah

lines.line: We're done enough yeah woah
lines.translation: We're done enough yeah woah
lines.phonetic: we're done enough yeah woah

lines.line: ohh oh oh (×2)
lines.translation: ohh oh oh (× 2)
lines.phonetic: ohh oh oh (×2)

lines.line: លះបង់ជីវិតពលី ពួកយើងសាមគ្គី
lines.translation: Sacrifice our lives, sacrifice our unity
lines.phonetic: leahbng chivit pli  puok yeung samokki

lines.line: គ្រប់យ៉ាងគឺដើម្បីខ្មែរ
lines.translation: Everything is for Khmer
lines.phonetic: krobyeang ku daembi khmer

lines.line: គ្រាប់បេ មិនមែនគ្រាប់ឃ្លី
lines.translation: Balls, not nuts
lines.phonetic: kreab be  minmen kreabkhli

lines.line: បើអ្នកបានស៊ី គ្មានឱកាសទៅវិញទេ
lines.translation: If you ate, there was no chance
lines.phonetic: bae anak ban sai  kmean aokasa towvinh te

lines.line: យើងរិះរកគ្រប់វិធី មិនចង់ឆ្ងាយ
lines.translation: We look for ways not to go far
lines.phonetic: yeung riahrk krob vithi  min chng chhngay

lines.line: Family ឆ្ងាយពុក ឆ្ងាយម៉ែ
lines.translation: Family far father far mother
lines.phonetic: family  chhngay pouk  chhngay me

lines.line: ដល់ម៉ោងដើរតួនាទី
lines.translation: It's time to act
lines.phonetic: dl maong daertuo neati

lines.line: ជីវិតជូនជាតិ ទោះស្លាប់ក៍មិនខ្លាចដែរ
lines.translation: Life for the nation, even if you die, you are not afraid
lines.phonetic: chivit choun cheate  toh slab  min khlach der

lines.line: ម្ដងទៀតហើយ ដែលពួកវារករឿង
lines.translation: Again, they find a way.
lines.phonetic: mdongtiet haey  del puokvea rokrueng

lines.line: ដែលពួកវាចិត្តសឿង ស្ម័គ្រចិត្តចូលងាប់
lines.translation: That they are willing to die
lines.phonetic: del puokvea chettasueng  smkrochett chaul ngeab

words.word: ស្ម័គ្រចិត្ត

lines.line: អញមិនមែនលេង ពួកអញមិនមែនក្មេង
lines.translation: I'm not playing, we are not young
lines.phonetic: anh minmen leng  puok anh minmen kmeng

lines.line: ពួកអានេះវាលលេង ចូលមកអញឱ្យគ្រាប់
lines.translation: They came to me to play.
lines.phonetic: puok a nih veal leng  chaul mk anh aoy kreab

lines.line: អ្នកណាមិនដឹង ពួកហែងសំផឹង
lines.translation: Who does not know the prostitutes
lines.phonetic: anaknea mindoeng  puok heng saamphoeng

lines.line: ចរិតវាអញ្ចឹង ឡើងក្លាយជាទម្លាប់
lines.translation: It becomes a habit
lines.phonetic: chrit vea anhchung  laeng klaycha tomleab

lines.line: ប្រទេសនេះវង្វេង លែងមានច្បាប់ទម្លាប់
lines.translation: This country is lost, there are no rules.
lines.phonetic: bratesa nih vongveng  leng meanochbab tomleab

words.word: ច្បាប់ទម្លាប់

lines.line: យីពួកអាអស់នេះ គេមើលធ្លុះគ្រប់ស្រទាប់
lines.translation: These guys see through all the layers.
lines.phonetic: yi puok a asanih  ke meulothlouh krob sratab

lines.line: ពួកអានេះសាហាវណាស់ អាពូជសាសន៍
lines.translation: These people are very cruel, racist
lines.phonetic: puok a nih sahav nasa  a pouchsasa

lines.line: ព្រៃផ្សៃ ចូលចិត្តលួចទឹកដីអ្នកដទៃ
lines.translation: Wild like to steal other people's land
lines.phonetic: preiphsaai  chaulchett luoch tukdei anakadtei

lines.line: ចូលចិត្តធ្វើខ្លួនឯង ដូចត្រឹមត្រូវ
lines.translation: Like to do the right thing
lines.phonetic: chaulchett thveukhluon eng  dauch troemotrauv

words.word: ត្រឹមត្រូវ

lines.line: ការពិតទៅ ពួកអាហ្នឹងចេះស្អី
lines.translation: In fact, what do they know?
lines.phonetic: karpit tow  puok ahnoeng cheh saei

lines.line: ផ្ទះវាមិននៅ ចង់មកនៅផ្ទះគេ
lines.translation: Home, it does not want to come home
lines.phonetic: phteah vea min now  chng mk nowphteah ke

lines.line: សុខស្រួល Ohh វាមិនចង់ទេ
lines.translation: Comfort Ohh it does not want
lines.phonetic: sokh sruol ohh  vea min chng te

lines.line: ថ្ងៃនេះ ពួកយើងសម្រក់ទឹកភ្នែក
lines.translation: Today we shed tears
lines.phonetic: thngainih  puok yeung samrok tukaphnek

lines.line: ថ្ងៃក្រោយ គង់ដល់វេនហ្អែងទេ
lines.translation: The next day is your turn
lines.phonetic: thngaikraoy  kng dlven haeng te

lines.line: ម្ដងទៀតហើយ ដែលពួកវារករឿង
lines.translation: Again, they find a way.
lines.phonetic: mdongtiet haey  del puokvea rokrueng

lines.line: ពួកយើងឈរបក់ដៃ មកហ្អែងមកឱ្យលឿន
lines.translation: We stand, wave, come quickly
lines.phonetic: puok yeung chhr bkdai  mk haeng mk aoy luen

lines.line: យើងសម្រុកទៅមុខ ព្រោះចិត្តយើងសឿង
lines.translation: We rush forward because our hearts are full
lines.phonetic: yeung samrouk towmoukh  proh chett yeung sueng

lines.line: បើកភ្លើងខៀវ ហៅយើងបិទភ្លើងលឿង
lines.translation: Turn on the blue light, call us off the yellow light
lines.phonetic: baekaphleung khiev  haw yeung betophleung lueng

lines.line: អត់ចង់បន្ថយទេ ចង់តែបន្ថែមល្បឿន
lines.translation: Do not want to decrease, want to increase speed
lines.phonetic: at chng banthoy te  chng te banthemolbuen

lines.line: ដៃក្តាប់ណែន ឱបជាប់តែកាំភ្លើង
lines.translation: Grip hands, holding only guns
lines.phonetic: daiktab nen  aob cheab te kaphleung

lines.line: មានឈាមខ្មែរ នៅក្នុងខ្លួនយើង
lines.translation: There is Khmer blood in us
lines.phonetic: mean chheam khmer  nowknong khluon yeung

lines.line: ពួកណាចង់ប្លន់ដី ប្រយ័ត្នបាត់ដៃជើង
lines.translation: Those who want to rob the land, beware of losing limbs
